instruction: Custom tool files go in `.opencode/tool/` (project) or `~/.config/opencode/tool/` (global). The filename becomes the tool name.
original_snippets: The filename becomes the tool name.

instruction: The `execute` function MUST return a string. Returning objects or non-string values causes runtime errors.
original_snippets: The execute function must return a `string`.

instruction: Use `@opencode-ai/plugin` for tools (not `@opencode-ai/sdk`). The sdk package is for external client access, not for defining tools.
Every schema argument MUST have `.describe()` so the LLM understands what it means.
original_snippets: Without descriptions, the LLM has no context for what each argument means.

instruction: Respect the `abort` signal in long-running tools. Check `abort.aborted` and pass the signal to async operations.
original_snippets: Ignoring it leaves dangling processes and resources locked.
